arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala’s release clause at Bayern Munich revealed...and there’s an interesting twist
arts.sum: Bayern Munich fans collectively released a sigh of relief when the club’s star player, Jamal Musiala, signed a five-year extension on Valentine’s Day. As negotiations carried over the past six months, a deal began to feel inevitable. According to Sky, Jamal Musiala's release clause is valid from this summer.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala's huge new Bayern Munich release clause as Chelsea confront major error
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala has signed a new deal with Bayern Munich which includes a mammoth release clause as Chelsea are left to digest his departure, which landed them less than £200k

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany says Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane “improved a lot” since he played against him
arts.sum: Harry Kane scoring goals at Bayern Munich is just plain inevitable. “He has improved a lot since I played against him.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso ready to face “energy”, “intensity” of Bayern Munich
arts.sum: We’re playing at home against FC Bayern, it’s always a top and special game. So I don’t think that’s a big advantage (for Bayer Leverkusen to have a bye through the Champions League playoff round, while Bayern Munich had to face Celtic FC on Wednesday).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Serge Gnabry expects another stiff test from Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich attacker Serge Gnabry thinks his squad will have to get over the mental hurdle they have faced against Bayer Leverkusen since 2022. They look like they have a strong bond in the team and they always want to win as well, which they did last season.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane’s massive net worth, the woman behind his success and unwarranted criticism
arts.sum: Harry Kane has earned millions and shattered records, so here's a look at his staggering net worth and the woman who has been by his side from the start

arts.ttl: Celtic must banish Bayern inferiority complex and one thing might just help them in Munich – Chris Sutton
arts.sum: Sutton reckons it’ll have to be shed if they are to have a serious chance of pulling off the shock

arts.ttl: How Celtic have 'matured' this season as Adam Idah pinpoints the Bayern Munich moment that proves his case
arts.sum: It was a rollercoaster of emotion at Celtic Park as the Hoops secured a Champions League lifeline in the first leg

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich and Leroy Sané are still in limbo; Manchester City to poach Florian Wirtz; Will Bayern and Bayer Leverkusen meet again? One exec hopes not; Real Madrid still chasing Liverpool star; and MORE!
arts.sum: After taking down Celtic FC in the Champions League midweek, Bayern Munich will travel to Bayer Leverkusen for the biggest match of the Bundesliga season to date. Bayer Leverkusen absolutely, positively needs a win in this match and seems ready to throw everything — including the kitchen sink — at Bayern Munich in hopes of capturing three points and making the Bundesliga title race a true fight once again.
